title: zornia echinocarpa
intro: Zornia echinocarpa, also known as the spiny zornia, is a plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, classified as a type of legume in the Fabaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, cough, and other respiratory issues. Its health benefits include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to aid in reducing oxidative stress and promoting overall well-being. Zornia echinocarpa can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
